criteria.name: controls_are_keyboard_accessible
criteria.description: Every interactive control — search input, threshold slider, chips, feedback controls, disclosures, palette entries, history checkboxes, bulk action bar, and run controls — is reachable and operable with Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, Space, or arrow keys
criteria.reasoning: Search submission, slider ArrowRight adjustment, and Group by topic Space toggle all worked through keyboard; visible controls use native buttons, inputs, checkboxes, and a focusable slider. Evidence: slider-keyboard.png

criteria.name: overlays_manage_focus
criteria.description: The command palette, export modal, save-search form, and confirmation dialogs trap focus while open, close on Escape, and return focus to the control that opened them
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Command palette and export/save/add-document overlays focused their first control and Escape returned focus for tested cases, but the confirmation dialog workflow could not be verified as a focus-managed overlay. Evidence: overlays-commands.png

criteria.name: icons_have_accessible_names
criteria.description: Icon-only controls (thumbs, close buttons, bulk checkboxes, status icons) carry accessible names or labels; decorative icons are hidden from the accessibility tree
criteria.reasoning: Visible icon-only result feedback controls, close buttons, clear-search, add-document, and delete controls exposed accessible names through aria-label, aria-labelledby, or tooltip labeling; decorative SVGs were aria-hidden. Evidence: results-shared.png

criteria.name: run_and_count_changes_announced
criteria.description: Completion of a re-index run, a step entering the failed state, and result-count changes from threshold or filter changes are announced through aria-live regions as well as shown visually
criteria.reasoning: Live regions visibly announced threshold result changes, indexing start, failure after retries, and final completion (“Indexed 120 documents”). Evidence: reindex-retry.png

criteria.name: forms_have_explicit_labels
criteria.description: The Save search and Add document form fields have visible labels, and validation messages are programmatically associated with their fields
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Save search and Add document fields had visible labels, but no programmatically associated validation messages were observed; fields had no aria-describedby linkage. Evidence: add-document-modal.png

criteria.name: headings_follow_logical_order
criteria.description: Panel and section headings follow a logical order with no skips (H1 for the app, H2 for panels, H3 within)
criteria.reasoning: Observed heading hierarchy starts with H1, followed by H2 panel/section headings and H3 result/detail headings without skipped levels. Evidence: document-detail.png

criteria.name: landmark_navigation_is_present
criteria.description: Landmark structure (main, navigation/complementary regions for the rail and panel) or a skip-to-content path is present
criteria.reasoning: The rendered app exposes main, complementary, and navigation landmarks, including the labeled workspace rail. Evidence: initial-shared.png

criteria.name: text_and_controls_have_contrast
criteria.description: All text — including score badges, highlighted excerpts, chips, and status treatments — meets sufficient color contrast against its background
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Read-only computed-style measurement found visible contrast below 4.5:1, including Save search at 4.47:1 and a result-status treatment at 4.45:1. Evidence: results-shared.png

criteria.name: semantic_html_roles_are_used
criteria.description: Interactive and structural elements use semantic roles — real buttons for actions, a slider role with value semantics for the threshold, list semantics for results and history
criteria.reasoning: Observed semantic roles include main/nav/complementary, search, list/listitem for results and history, switch, and a slider with aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax, aria-valuenow, and accessible labeling. Evidence: slider-keyboard.png

criteria.name: reduced_motion_is_respected
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion set, staggered entrances, panel slides, re-rank movement, and countdown animations are removed while all functionality remains
criteria.reasoning: In the reduced-motion browser, prefers-reduced-motion matched true and computed transition/animation durations were reduced to 1e-06s; real keyboard search still produced results and live announcements. Evidence: reduced-motion.png

criteria.name: multi_facet_reload_reset
criteria.description: Run a query, give one result a thumbs-up, save a search, add a document, and set the threshold to 0.4 — then reload the page. All facets coherently reset to the seeded baseline: seeded corpus without the added document, empty query, no history, no saved searches, no feedback, threshold at its default, and a fully built index — never a mix of surviving and reset facets
criteria.reasoning: Reload returned the seeded baseline: empty query/history, no added document, default threshold, and no feedback. Evidence: multi_facet_reload_reset-shared.png

criteria.name: search_to_export_pipeline_tracks
criteria.description: Full pipeline probe: run a query, note the top three results and their scores, thumbs-up the third result, and raise the threshold; then open the Search report export. The JSON has schemaVersion 1, request.threshold matches the slider, results order and feedback match the cards after the boost, and only hits at or above the threshold appear — every stage tracked the same live state under the SearchReport field contract
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The Search report exported threshold 0.45 and three visible results, but the thumbs-up feedback was exported as "none" instead of matching the requested boosted card. Evidence: search_to_export_pipeline_tracks-shared.png

criteria.name: add_index_search_pipeline
criteria.description: Add a document whose body contains a distinctive invented word, confirm a search for that word returns nothing before rebuild while the stale count reads one, run Index Now to completion, then search again: the new document appears with a similarity score, the stale count reads zero, and the index statistics count the new document
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The new document showed stale count 1 and no search match, but indexing did not complete successfully; the run reached a failed step and stale remained 1. Evidence: add_index_search_pipeline-shared.png

criteria.name: different_queries_different_rankings
criteria.description: Run two clearly different queries (different topics) and compare their result lists: the rankings, similarity scores, and explanation disclosures differ in ways consistent with each query's terms; then select both in the Compare view and confirm the overlap and unique counts are consistent with the two visible result sets
criteria.reasoning: The React and data-engineering queries produced distinct rankings, scores, explanations, and visible result sets; Compare showed 0 overlap and 12 unique results on each side. Evidence: different_queries_different_rankings-shared-final.png

criteria.name: threshold_count_delta_exact
criteria.description: With results visible, note the result count, then raise the threshold until at least one card disappears: the count decreases by exactly the number of hidden cards, and the cluster group counts (when grouped) still sum to the new total
criteria.reasoning: The query returned 15 results at baseline; raising the threshold to 0.45 produced 3 results, hiding exactly 12, and grouped results showed one group totaling 3. Evidence: threshold_count_delta_exact-shared.png

criteria.name: feedback_rerank_and_reset_round_trip
criteria.description: Note a query's ranked order, thumbs-up a mid-ranked result and confirm it moves up with its score adjusted, re-run the same query and confirm the adjusted order reproduces, then use Reset Feedback and confirm the original order returns exactly
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The requested thumbs-up did not produce an observed feedback state or reranked card order, so rerun/reset equivalence could not be established. Evidence: search_to_export_pipeline_tracks-shared.png

criteria.name: interleaved_run_and_search_integrity
criteria.description: Start a re-index run, pause it mid-run, run a search and open a result's detail panel, then resume the run: the run continues from exactly the paused step with earlier timestamps unchanged, and the search results and panel remain intact — neither flow corrupted the other
criteria.reasoning: A re-index run was started and paused, a search returned 15 results, a document detail panel remained open, and resume returned the run to running without losing either search results or detail content. Evidence: interleaved_run_and_search_integrity-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_redo_round_trip_tracks_derived
criteria.description: Delete a document that appears in the current results, confirm the card disappears and the index statistics drop by one, undo and confirm both the card and statistics return, then redo and confirm they drop again — derived surfaces track through every transition
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Delete, undo, and redo changed the result count 15→14→15→14, but the full required statistics checks at each transition were not directly observed end-to-end. Evidence: undo_redo_round_trip_tracks_derived-shared.png

criteria.name: library_package_import_export_round_trip
criteria.description: Add a document with a distinctive title and save a uniquely named search, open Library package export and note documents length and that saved search name, delete documents until the count diverges, Import the earlier package JSON, then confirm the index list count, the saved search name, and a fresh Library package export reconstruct to match the imported document — including schemaVersion 1 and library exactly Semantic Search Library
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Library package export was observed with schemaVersion 1 and library "Semantic Search Library", but the required add/save/delete/import/re-export round trip was not completed. Evidence: library_package_import_export_round_trip-shared.png

criteria.name: seeded_corpus_and_index_stats
criteria.description: On first load the index panel reports at least 120 seeded documents spanning at least 6 topics and using all six closed document types (guide, reference, prompt, checklist, paper, note), its document list shows entries with realistic multi-sentence content, and the index statistics (total indexed, stale count, last build time, distinct term count) render with values consistent with the library
criteria.reasoning: 120 documents, 6 document types, realistic entries, and consistent index statistics were observed. Evidence: seeded_corpus_and_index_stats-shared.png

criteria.name: ranked_result_card_anatomy
criteria.description: Running a query via Enter or the Search control renders a ranked list of document cards, each showing the document title, a type tag, its topic tags, a similarity score badge with a monospace numeric value between 0.00 and 1.00, and a two-line excerpt whose most relevant passage carries a distinct highlight background
criteria.reasoning: Search results showed titled cards with type/topic tags, numeric scores, excerpts, and highlighted terms. Evidence: ranked_result_card_anatomy-shared.png

criteria.name: descending_order_and_determinism
criteria.description: The result list is sorted by similarity score descending, a visible count above the results states how many match, and re-running the same query with unchanged corpus, threshold, and feedback returns the same ranked order both times
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Descending scores and result counts were observed, but identical rerun order under unchanged conditions was not fully verified. Evidence: ranked_result_card_anatomy-shared.png

criteria.name: syntax_chips_parse_and_combine
criteria.description: Typing structured tokens (tag:, type:, before: followed by a value) in the query turns each token into a removable chip above the results when the query runs, a query combining tag, type, and before tokens applies all filters together, and the result count reflects the combination while the free-text remainder still drives the semantic ranking
criteria.reasoning: Combined tag:, type:, and before: tokens rendered as chips and reduced results to 5 while retaining semantic text ranking. Evidence: ranked_result_card_anatomy-shared.png

criteria.name: chip_removal_and_unknown_token_notice
criteria.description: Removing a filter chip re-runs the query without that filter and the visible count updates; removing all chips restores unfiltered results; a token with an unknown tag or type value shows an inline notice naming the unmatched value while the remaining valid tokens still apply
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Unknown tag notice was observed, but chip removal and restoration of unfiltered results were not completed. Evidence: ranked_result_card_anatomy-shared.png

criteria.name: threshold_slider_filters_live
criteria.description: A similarity threshold slider from 0.0 to 1.0 in 0.05 increments hides result cards whose score is below the selected value, and the visible result count updates immediately as the slider moves, without re-running the query
criteria.reasoning: The real slider advanced in 0.05 increments and threshold 1.00 immediately produced 0 results. Evidence: empty_state_recovery-shared.png

criteria.name: feedback_reranks_persists_and_resets
criteria.description: Thumbs-up on a result visibly boosts its position and score in the current query's ranking and thumbs-down demotes it, the affected card shows a feedback marker, re-running the same query reproduces the adjusted ranking, and a Reset Feedback control restores the unadjusted order
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Up/down feedback visibly changed scores and markers, but rerun persistence and reset restoration were not fully completed. Evidence: feedback_reranks_persists_and_resets-shared.png

criteria.name: score_explanation_disclosure
criteria.description: Each result card has a collapsed-by-default explanation disclosure that expands on activation with a rotating chevron to reveal matched terms with per-term contribution bars and values (plus any feedback adjustment line), remembers its open state per result while the app is open, and shows different terms and contributions for two different results consistent with their excerpts
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Explanation expanded with matched terms, contribution value, and feedback adjustment, but different contributions across two expanded results were not fully verified. Evidence: feedback_reranks_persists_and_resets-shared.png

criteria.name: keyword_fallback_labeled
criteria.description: A query that returns zero semantic results with similarity at or above 0.2 falls back to keyword matching, the results section is labeled Keyword results (no semantic matches above threshold), and fallback cards still show the matched words via the highlighted excerpt
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: A labeled keyword-fallback state was not observed. Evidence: ranked_result_card_anatomy-shared.png

criteria.name: topic_clustering_round_trip
criteria.description: The Group by topic toggle regroups the ranked list into expandable topic groups whose header counts sum to the total result count, expanding or collapsing a group shows or hides only that group's cards, and toggling grouping off restores the flat ranked order
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Topic grouping and counts were observed, but reliable collapse/expand and flat-order restoration were not completed. Evidence: ranked_result_card_anatomy-shared.png

criteria.name: detail_panel_related_and_breadcrumbs
criteria.description: Clicking a result card opens a side panel with the document's full body, type, tags, and a Related section of exactly three next-most-similar documents with similarity values that differ between two different documents; clicking a related row shows that document in the same panel and pushes a breadcrumb, clicking an earlier breadcrumb navigates back, and the panel closes via its close control or Escape
criteria.reasoning: The detail panel showed full body, type, tags, exactly three related rows with differing scores, breadcrumbs, related navigation, and Escape close. Evidence: detail_panel_related_and_breadcrumbs-shared.png

criteria.name: command_palette_fuzzy_and_keyboard
criteria.description: Pressing Cmd+K or Ctrl+K opens a command palette whose input fuzzy-matches across document titles, saved searches, and app commands with matches updating on every keystroke; arrow keys move the highlight, Enter activates the highlighted entry (opening a document, running a saved search, or invoking a command), and Escape closes the palette
criteria.reasoning: Ctrl+K opened the palette; typing filtered matches, arrow navigation was available, and Enter activated the history command. Evidence: history_timeline_appends-shared.png

criteria.name: arrow_key_result_selection
criteria.description: With results on screen, ArrowDown and ArrowUp move a visible selection highlight through the result cards and Enter opens the selected card's detail panel
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: ArrowDown did not produce a single visible result selection highlight or open a selected result with Enter. Evidence: arrow_key_result_selection-shared.png

criteria.name: history_timeline_appends
criteria.description: Every executed query appends a history entry showing the query text, its chips, a timestamp, and the result count at execution, with entries ordered newest first
criteria.reasoning: History showed four newest-first entries with query text, timestamps, and result counts. Evidence: history_timeline_appends-shared.png

criteria.name: save_search_validation_and_rerun
criteria.description: The Save search form keeps its Save control disabled until the required name is non-empty, saving with an empty name shows an inline message naming the name field and adds nothing, a successfully saved search appears in the Saved list, clicking a saved search or history entry re-runs that query restoring its chips and threshold, and a saved search's Delete action requires confirmation
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Disabled empty-name validation and successful saved-search creation were observed, but delete confirmation and full rerun restoration were not completed. Evidence: save_search_validation_and_rerun-shared.png

criteria.name: history_bulk_delete_exact
criteria.description: History entries support checkbox multi-selection that reveals a contextual action bar with Delete selected (its confirmation naming the selected count) and Clear selection; confirming removes exactly the selected entries and leaves the rest
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: The history bulk-selection confirmation workflow was not reached and verified. Evidence: history_timeline_appends-shared.png

criteria.name: compare_queries_overlap_and_diff
criteria.description: The Compare view shows two chosen queries' result sets side by side with documents in both sets marked as overlap in both columns and side-unique documents carrying a distinct marker, a summary line states the overlap count and each side's unique count consistently with the columns, and changing either selected query updates the columns and summary without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Two queries rendered side-by-side with overlap/unique markers and consistent 0 overlap, 12 unique left, and 12 unique right summary. Evidence: compare_queries_overlap_and_diff-shared.png

criteria.name: add_document_validates_and_marks_stale
criteria.description: The Add document form keeps its Add control disabled until title, body, and type are valid and shows an inline message naming an empty required field without adding; a valid submission adds the document to the index panel's list immediately, increases the stale count by exactly one, and the new document does not appear in search results before a rebuild
criteria.reasoning: A valid document was added immediately, increasing documents to 121 and stale count to 1; it was not searchable before rebuild. Evidence: add_document_validates_and_marks_stale-shared.png

criteria.name: index_bulk_actions
criteria.description: The index panel's document list supports checkbox multi-selection with a contextual action bar offering Delete selected (confirmation naming the count) and Mark stale; bulk deleting removes exactly the selected documents and the index statistics update to match
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Bulk selection, confirmation, deletion, and Mark stale were not reached and verified. Evidence: add_document_validates_and_marks_stale-shared.png

criteria.name: reindex_run_steps_and_status_bar
criteria.description: Index Now starts a simulated re-index decomposed into one visible ingest step per document, each showing the document title and a status advancing through pending, running, and complete or failed; while active the status bar shows Indexing with running progress M/N and on completion it shows Indexed N documents
criteria.reasoning: Indexing visibly showed per-document pending/running/complete states, progress, elapsed time, and ultimately 121/121 ingested. Evidence: reindex_run_steps_and_status_bar-shared.png

criteria.name: retry_backoff_and_resume_from_step
criteria.description: A simulated ingest failure retries automatically with a visible backoff countdown and attempt counter (such as retry 2 of 3); a step that exhausts retries is marked failed with an inline error summary and a manual Retry control, and activating it resumes the run from that step while earlier completed steps keep their original timestamps and never re-execute
criteria.reasoning: A failure showed retry backoff, attempt 2 of 3, failed count and Retry failed step; retry resumed from 93/121 with earlier steps complete. Evidence: reindex_run_steps_and_status_bar-shared.png

criteria.name: pause_resume_rollup_timeline
criteria.description: Pausing a running re-index freezes progression at the current document and resuming continues from exactly that step; a rollup showing documents ingested out of total, elapsed time, and failure count derives live from the step states, and an ordered event timeline of step transitions with timestamps can be filtered by status
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Live rollup and timestamped timeline were observed, but pause/resume did not visibly freeze and continue at a verified exact step. Evidence: reindex_run_steps_and_status_bar-shared.png

criteria.name: rebuild_makes_stale_searchable
criteria.description: After the re-index run completes, a query matching a previously stale document's content returns it with a similarity score, and the stale count returns to zero
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Rebuild completed with stale count 0, but searching for the added document did not return it. Evidence: reindex_run_steps_and_status_bar-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_redo_with_labels
criteria.description: Undo and Redo controls revert and reapply document additions, deletions, bulk deletions, feedback marks, and saved-search changes, each showing the label of the action it will affect and disabling when its stack is empty; undoing a document deletion restores the document to the library and index statistics, and redo removes it again
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Undo and Redo visibly reverted and reapplied Add document with labels, but the required deletion, feedback, and saved-search action coverage was not completed. Evidence: add_document_validates_and_marks_stale-shared.png

criteria.name: export_report_live_and_copyable
criteria.description: The Export modal's Search report tab shows JSON under the SearchReport field contract — schemaVersion exactly 1, generatedAt ending in Z, request with query, filters (kind one of tag|type|before and value), and threshold, plus results hits each with id, title, type one of guide|reference|prompt|checklist|paper|note, score to two decimals, snippet, highlights, and feedback one of up|down|none — the JSON parses without error, matches on-screen ranking after threshold and feedback changes, and Download and Copy emit the visible text with Copy showing a confirmation
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Search-report JSON visibly matched the contract and Download/Copy controls existed, but Copy produced no visible confirmation. Evidence: export_report_live_and_copyable-shared.png

criteria.name: document_and_saved_search_field_contracts
criteria.description: Add document submits a DocumentUpsert shape — title 1–200 trimmed, body at least 20 characters trimmed, type exactly one of guide|reference|prompt|checklist|paper|note, tags 0–12 unique non-empty strings — keeping Add disabled with named field errors when invalid; Save search submits a SavedSearch shape with unique name 1–80, query, filters, and threshold, rejecting empty or duplicate names with an inline name error and storing nothing
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Valid document and saved-search creation worked, but all invalid-field, duplicate-name, and named-error branches were not fully verified. Evidence: add_document_validates_and_marks_stale-shared.png

criteria.name: library_package_export_and_import_round_trip
criteria.description: The Export modal's Library package tab shows JSON with schemaVersion exactly 1, library exactly Semantic Search Library, documents as DocumentUpsert objects including id, savedSearches as SavedSearch objects, and generatedAt ending in Z; adding a document or saving a search updates those arrays on reopen; Import of a previously exported package restores the corpus and saved list so a fresh export matches, while malformed packages show a named error and change nothing
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Library package export showed schemaVersion 1, library name, documents, and saved searches, but import round-trip and malformed-package behavior were not completed. Evidence: export_report_live_and_copyable-shared.png

criteria.name: empty_state_recovery
criteria.description: A query matching nothing even by keyword, or a threshold set above the top score, shows an empty state explaining that no documents matched and offering a control that clears chips and resets the threshold; using it restores results
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Threshold 1.00 produced an empty result state, but the clear/reset recovery control was not observed restoring results. Evidence: empty_state_recovery-shared.png

criteria.name: layout_adapts_desktop_to_mobile
criteria.description: The three-region layout adapts gracefully from 1440px desktop (rail, results, panel) to 375px mobile without breaking any of the search, index, or compare surfaces
criteria.reasoning: Desktop uses a docked rail and wide main area; mobile collapses the rail and reflows search/results vertically, with compare/index still reachable. Evidence: layout-desktop-shared.png, mobile-results-shared.png

criteria.name: mobile_tap_targets_are_large_enough
criteria.description: At mobile width, chips, feedback controls, checkboxes, and card actions are tap targets of at least 44px
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Most primary controls meet 44px, but observed detail/card actions include 32–34px wide buttons, below the 44px target. Evidence: mobile-detail-shared.png

criteria.name: typography_resizes_across_breakpoints
criteria.description: Card titles, badges, and body text resize appropriately between desktop and mobile and remain readable at both
criteria.reasoning: Desktop heading and card typography are large and horizontal; mobile typography visibly scales down and wraps while remaining readable. Evidence: layout-desktop-shared.png, mobile-results-shared.png

criteria.name: content_avoids_clipping_and_overflow
criteria.description: No result card, chip row, status bar, or panel content clips or overflows the viewport at any width between 1440px and 375px
criteria.reasoning: At desktop, tablet, and mobile widths, cards, chips, search controls, status areas, and detail content remain within their available width and wrap appropriately. Evidence: layout-desktop-shared.png, mobile-results-shared.png, tablet-overlay-shared.png

criteria.name: rail_and_panel_adapt_below_768
criteria.description: At widths of 768 pixels and below the left rail collapses behind a toggle that opens it as an overlay and the detail panel becomes a full-width overlay; at desktop widths both are docked and the rail is open by default
criteria.reasoning: At 768px, the rail is fixed off-canvas at x=-336 with an open toggle, while the document detail panel is a fixed full-width overlay; desktop shows the rail docked open. Evidence: tablet-overlay-shared.png

criteria.name: stacking_reflows_logically
criteria.description: At narrow widths the regions stack in a logical order — query controls first, then results, with secondary sections reachable — rather than interleaving arbitrarily
criteria.reasoning: Mobile order is workspace heading, search controls, filters/status, then result cards; secondary rail and detail surfaces are overlays. Evidence: mobile-results-shared.png, mobile-detail-shared.png

criteria.name: chips_wrap_or_scroll_contained
criteria.description: Overflowing chip rows and the history list wrap or scroll within their own containers at narrow widths instead of stretching the page
criteria.reasoning: Mobile filter chips and explanatory syntax wrap onto multiple lines without widening the page; the workspace rail is independently scrollable when open. Evidence: mobile-results-shared.png

criteria.name: small_screens_avoid_horizontal_scroll
criteria.description: At 375px width there is no page-level horizontal scrolling anywhere in the app
criteria.reasoning: At 375px, measured document/body scroll width was 360px, not wider than the viewport; visible content stayed within the screen. Evidence: mobile-results-shared.png

criteria.name: long_lists_scroll_contained
criteria.description: The result list, index document list, and event timeline scroll within the layout at every width without pushing fixed chrome off screen
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Search results and indexed documents expand the main/page height with overflow visible instead of scrolling inside bounded list containers; measured result and index lists had clientHeight equal to scrollHeight and overflowY visible. Evidence: mobile-results-shared.png

criteria.name: fixed_controls_remain_accessible
criteria.description: The search input, status bar, and undo/redo controls remain reachable at every viewport size
criteria.reasoning: The header remains sticky with undo/redo and command/export controls, the mobile rail toggle is reachable, and search/status controls remain reachable in the reflowed content. Evidence: mobile-results-shared.png, tablet-overlay-shared.png

criteria.name: serves_clean_and_fast
criteria.description: The app serves via its documented npm start path on port 3000, renders a working interface (not a blank or broken page), and is interactive within 2 seconds of a local cold load
criteria.reasoning: Rendered a usable Atlas Semantic Library UI quickly at localhost:3000 with interactive search and workspace controls. Evidence: serves_clean_and_fast-shared.png

criteria.name: shared_state_coherence
criteria.description: Deleting a document from the index panel immediately removes its card from any visible results, decreases the result count, and updates the index statistics — the same datum never shows different values in two places without a reload
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: After deleting doc-001, the React result count stayed at 15 and “Foundations: React guide” remained visible; index/result surfaces did not update coherently. Evidence: shared_state_coherence-after-delete.png

criteria.name: reload_resets_to_seed
criteria.description: A page reload returns the app to its seeded baseline: the seeded corpus, an empty query, no history entries, no saved searches, no feedback, and a fully built index
criteria.reasoning: After a search, reload returned an empty search field, zero history entries, and the seeded 120-document corpus with a current index. Evidence: reload_resets_to_seed-shared.png

criteria.name: console_stays_clean
criteria.description: No console errors or unhandled promise rejections appear on load or during a full exercise of searching, feedback, palette use, bulk operations, undo/redo, and a complete re-index run
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Console errors were absent during the exercised search, feedback, palette, export, compare, undo/redo, and re-index actions, but the complete required bulk-operation exercise could not be completed because the visible selection control was obstructed. Evidence: rapid_interaction_stays_synced-shared.png

criteria.name: derived_surfaces_agree
criteria.description: The Search report export, Library package export, the compare view, the cluster group counts, and the visible result list all agree with each other for the same query and corpus state — counts sum, rankings match, and export field contracts use the same ids, types, and scores shown on cards
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The visible result list/export reported 15 results, while compare for the same query reported only 12 overlap; derived counts therefore disagreed. Evidence: derived_surfaces_agree-shared.png

criteria.name: api_shaped_exports_parse
criteria.description: Search report and Library package Download/Copy payloads parse as JSON with schemaVersion exactly 1; Search report includes request and results under the declared keys; Library package includes library exactly Semantic Search Library plus documents and savedSearches arrays whose objects match the DocumentUpsert and SavedSearch field contracts
criteria.reasoning: Visible Search report and Library package previews parsed as JSON with schemaVersion 1; the package had the required library string, documents array, and savedSearches array, with document fields matching the observed contract. Evidence: api_shaped_exports_parse-shared.png

criteria.name: rapid_interaction_stays_synced
criteria.description: Rapid interleaved interaction — quick threshold drags, fast feedback clicks, palette open/close, view switches during a re-index run — leaves all views consistent with each other, with no desynced counts or stale panels
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Re-index and view switching were exercised, but the required rapid threshold-drag and bulk interaction sequence could not be completed because the visible controls were obstructed; full synchronization was not directly verifiable. Evidence: rapid_interaction_stays_synced-shared.png

criteria.name: search_to_report_flow_complete
criteria.description: The full search flow works end to end: entering a query and pressing Enter renders the ranked list with scores descending, moving the threshold slider hides low-scoring cards and updates the count, thumbs-up moves a result up with a feedback marker, and the Search report export shows schemaVersion 1 with the same query, threshold, order, and feedback — all without a reload
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Search, ranking, feedback, and report export worked, but the threshold slider did not change the threshold or result count. Evidence: search_to_report_flow_complete-threshold-empty.png

criteria.name: invalid_forms_validate_inline
criteria.description: Submitting Save search with an empty or duplicate name, or Add document with an empty title, body shorter than 20 characters, or type outside the closed list, triggers immediate inline validation naming the field and creates nothing
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Empty Save search and Add document forms showed disabled submits, but the required inline field-specific validation for all invalid cases was not observed. Evidence: invalid_forms_validate_inline-add-document.png

criteria.name: index_flow_updates_related_displays
criteria.description: The add-and-index flow updates every related display: after adding a document the index list, stale count, and status bar all change; after Index Now completes the results, statistics, and status bar all reflect the rebuilt index
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Adding a document updated the document and stale counts, but the initial Index Now run failed before completion and required retry. Evidence: index_flow_updates_related_displays-index-complete.png

criteria.name: delete_flow_updates_all_surfaces
criteria.description: Deleting a document (singly or via bulk delete) removes it from the index list, any visible results, the related rows, and the index statistics after deletion
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The delete confirmation opened, but after accepting, the document remained in the index and results. Evidence: delete_flow_updates_all_surfaces-after-delete.png

criteria.name: view_switch_retains_state
criteria.description: Switching between the results, compare, history, and index sections and back retains the current query, threshold, chips, and selection — no view switch silently clears search state
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The query persisted across view switches, but retention of threshold, chips, and selection was not fully observed. Evidence: view_switch_retains_state-react.png

criteria.name: no_match_empty_state_recovers
criteria.description: Driving results to empty (an unmatched query or an over-raised threshold) shows a clear empty state whose recovery control (clear chips / reset threshold) restores results without a reload
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: An unmatched query produced a clear empty state, but its recovery control left the app at zero results. Evidence: no_match_empty_state_recovers-after-clear.png

criteria.name: filters_update_all_surfaces
criteria.description: Applying and removing chips updates the result list, the visible count, and the cluster groups together — no surface keeps showing filtered-out documents
criteria.reasoning: Applied and removed the tag:react chip; the result count/list and grouped cluster display updated consistently. Evidence: filters_update_all_surfaces-grouped-on.png

criteria.name: collapsible_chrome_preserves_workflow
criteria.description: Collapsing and reopening the left rail (and closing then reopening the detail panel) preserves workflow continuity — the same query, results, and selection are still in place
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: No left-rail collapse/reopen control was observable, so the full required workflow could not be exercised; detail closing was observed. Evidence: collapsible_chrome_preserves_workflow-detail.png

criteria.name: overlays_support_expected_flows
criteria.description: The command palette, export modal, save-search form, and delete confirmations open, complete their flow, and close as expected, returning the user to an intact search context
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Command palette, export modal, and save-search flow worked, but the delete confirmation did not complete successfully and the document remained. Evidence: overlays_support_expected_flows-save-complete.png

criteria.name: flow_recovers_without_reload
criteria.description: Every dead-end candidate recovers in-app: an unknown syntax token, an empty compare selection, a failed ingest step, and an emptied history all leave working controls to continue without a reload
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The failed ingest recovered through Retry failed step, but recovery for unknown syntax, empty compare, and emptied history was not fully verified. Evidence: flow_recovers_without_reload-failed-ingest-retry.png

criteria.name: library_package_round_trip_flow
criteria.description: Exporting a Library package after adding a document and saving a search, diverging the corpus by deletes, then Importing that JSON restores the index list count and saved search so a fresh Library package export matches — Download or Copy emits the visible preview text
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Library package export, preview, and copy worked, but the required delete divergence and Import restoration round trip could not be completed. Evidence: library_package_round_trip_flow-copy-toast.png

criteria.name: three_region_layout
criteria.description: At desktop width the app composes a main search column (query input, chips row, threshold slider, results), a right side panel area for document detail, and a left rail with sections or tabs for history, saved searches, compare, and the index panel
criteria.reasoning: Desktop view shows a left workspace rail, central search/results column, and right document-detail panel. Evidence: three_region_layout-detail.png

criteria.name: accent_bar_encodes_score
criteria.description: Result cards carry a left accent bar whose opacity visibly scales with the similarity score — a card scoring near 1.0 renders the accent clearly stronger than a card scoring near 0.5 — so ranking strength is readable at a glance
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Result cards show accent bars, but the observed bars did not visibly scale between the displayed similarity scores. Evidence: accent_bar_encodes_score-compare.png

criteria.name: badges_and_markers_distinct
criteria.description: Similarity badges render their two-decimal value in a monospace face inside a compact tag, and feedback markers, overlap markers, and unique markers are visually distinct chips that cannot be confused with each other
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Monospace two-decimal similarity badges and feedback/topic chips were observed, but distinct overlap and unique markers were not observed. Evidence: badges_and_markers_distinct-shared.png

criteria.name: excerpt_highlight_scoped
criteria.description: The highlighted excerpt passage uses a warm highlight background distinct from the card background, applied only to the matching span rather than the whole excerpt
criteria.reasoning: Matching terms use a warm highlight applied only to the matching spans, with the rest of each excerpt retaining its normal background. Evidence: badges_and_markers_distinct-shared.png

criteria.name: status_bar_semantic_treatments
criteria.description: The index status bar uses an informational treatment while indexing and a success treatment when the index is current, and the stale count renders in a warning treatment whenever it is above zero
criteria.reasoning: Indexing was shown with an informational blue treatment, current status with green success treatment, and stale count above zero with a yellow warning treatment. Evidence: status_bar_semantic_treatments-shared.png

criteria.name: step_status_treatments_consistent
criteria.description: Pending, running, retrying, failed, and complete ingest states each carry a distinct color or icon treatment, applied consistently between the step list and the event timeline
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Running, failed/retry, and complete treatments were observed, but all required pending and retrying states were not directly observed consistently across both lists. Evidence: status_bar_semantic_treatments-shared.png

criteria.name: typography_hierarchy
criteria.description: Typography shows a clear hierarchy — app title larger than panel headings, panel headings larger than card titles, card titles larger than body and metadata text — consistent across views
criteria.reasoning: The app title is visibly largest, followed by section headings, card titles, and body/metadata text; computed sizes confirmed 46px, 22px, 17px, and 14px respectively. Evidence: typography_hierarchy-shared.png

criteria.name: spacing_rhythm
criteria.description: Gaps between the rail, results column, and side panel, and between cards and sections, are visually regular with no crowded or orphaned regions
criteria.reasoning: Desktop rail, main column, detail panel, cards, and sections use regular, visibly consistent gaps without crowded or orphaned regions. Evidence: three_region_layout-detail.png

criteria.name: component_state_treatments
criteria.description: Buttons, inputs, sliders, and toggles show distinct default, hover, focus (visible ring), disabled, and error treatments, and one consistent icon set is used across the toolbar, cards, status bar, and panels
criteria.reasoning: Observed distinct default and hover button colors, a visible blue focus ring on the search input, disabled controls, slider/toggle styling, warning/error index states, and a consistent outlined icon style. Evidence: component_state_treatments-shared.png
